title: Mexican Billionaire Ricardo Salinas Bets 70% of His Portfolio on Bitcoin, Eyes $1 Million Price
summary: Mexican billionaire Ricardo Salinas has increased his bitcoin holdings from 10% to 70% of his portfolio. He predicts bitcoin could eventually reach $1 million. This bold bet underscores growing institutional confidence in bitcoin as a long-term store of value.
body:
Mexican billionaire Ricardo Salinas has significantly increased his investment in bitcoin, allocating 70% of his portfolio to the cryptocurrency. This is a substantial increase from his 10% allocation in 2020. Salinas, known for his bullish stance on bitcoin, also predicts that the price of bitcoin could eventually reach $1 million.

Salinas shared his investment strategy and price prediction in a recent interview. He emphasized his belief in bitcoin's potential as a hedge against inflation and economic instability. His portfolio now holds a majority stake in bitcoin, reflecting his confidence in the cryptocurrency's long-term value.

This move by Salinas highlights the growing trend of high-net-worth individuals and institutional investors turning to bitcoin as a key component of their investment strategies. For everyday investors, this could signal a shift in perception towards bitcoin as a legitimate asset class. Salinas' prediction of a $1 million bitcoin price, while ambitious, underscores the potential for significant long-term growth.

Investors should watch for further developments in the bitcoin market, including regulatory changes and adoption by other major institutions. Salinas' bold bet could inspire more investors to consider bitcoin as a serious investment option. Read more → https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/mexican-billionaire-ricardo-salinas-bets
